## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? -->

## Type
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs / config

## Checklist
- [ ] Follows `feature/name` or `bugfix/name` branch naming
- [ ] Targets `development` branch (never `main` directly)
- [ ] No `any` types introduced
- [ ] All new components use `ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush`
- [ ] All new components are standalone
- [ ] Static UI text added to `src/assets/i18n/en.json`
- [ ] BEM naming used in SCSS
- [ ] No `::ng-deep` used
- [ ] Responsive (tested on mobile)
- [ ] Accessible (keyboard nav + aria where needed)
- [ ] `tasks/backlog.md` updated if applicable
